Output"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"language":"txt","children":["The built site is written to ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"DOCIT_OUTPUT_DIR"}]," (default ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"docs/dist"}],") in your project root. Set the env var to use a different location (e.g. ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"docs"}],", ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"dist"}],", ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"build"}],"). Deploy via GitHub Actions or copy to any static host."]}],"\n",["$","$L5",null,{"level":2,"id":"3-content-structure","children":"3. Content structure"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Docit uses HydePHP's content directories:"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Directory"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"language":"txt","children":["$","$L7",null,{"children":"docs"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Documentation pages (Markdown)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"language":"txt","children":["$","$L7",null,{"children":"_pages"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Static pages like index, 404 (Markdown or HTML)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"language":"txt","children":["$","$L7",null,{"children":"_posts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Blog posts (optional)"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"language":"txt","children":["Place your Markdown files in ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"docs/"}]," in the docit package (or your consuming package). The sidebar order and labels are configured in ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"config/docs.php"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","$L5",null,{"level":2,"id":"4-customization","children":"4. Customization"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"language":"txt","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Site name & URL"}],": ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"config/hyde.php"}]," or ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":".env"}]," (",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"SITE_NAME"}],", ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"SITE_URL"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"language":"txt","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sidebar"}],": ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"config/docs.php"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"language":"txt","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Navigation"}],": ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"config/hyde.php"}]," → ",["$","$L7",null,{"children":"navigation"}]]}],"\n"]}]]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"mx-auto mt-8 w-full max-w-2xl lg:max-w-5xl","children":["$","$L8",null,{}]}]]}],null,["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","$a",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@b"}]}]]}],{},null,false,false]},null,false,false]},null,false,false],["$","$1","h",{"children":[null,["$","$Lc",null,{"children":"$Ld"}],["$","div",null,{"hidden":true,"children":["$","$Le",null,{"children":"$Lf"}]}],null]}],false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$10",[]],"S":true}
